title: Tournament Backend: Positional Stats, Stack Depth, Hand Matrix, Bet Sizing
plan: Add position-specific and stack-depth health range attributes (_pos_vpip_healthy, _pos_pfr_healthy, _stack_vpip_healthy, _stack_pfr_healthy, _stack_3bet_healthy) to TournamentAnalyzer.__init__()

Import helper functions from cash.py (_categorize_hand, _classify_preflop_action, _classify_pot_type, _count_active_players, _compute_bet_sizing, _empty_pt_acc, _accumulate_pt, _format_pt_stats, _classify_winrate_health, _median, _size_distribution, _format_sizing_data, RANKS, _PREFLOP_BUCKETS, _POSTFLOP_BUCKETS, etc.)

Implement get_positional_stats() with per-position VPIP/PFR/3-Bet/AF/CBet/WTSD/W$SD, radar chart data, blinds defense metrics, ATS, 3-bet matrix, most profitable/deficitary position comparison, and position-specific health badges
Implement get_stack_depth_stats() with deep/medium/shallow/shove tiers, per-tier stats with health badges, position × tier cross-table, and stack coverage metrics
Implement get_hand_matrix() with 13×13 preflop matrix per position, action breakdown, win rates, top 10 most profitable hands, and top 10 most deficit hands
Implement get_bet_sizing_analysis() with pot-type segmentation (limped/SRP/3-bet/4-bet+), sizing distributions per street, HU vs multiway breakdown, and diagnostics
Write/extend tournament tests covering all four new methods
Run quality gates (typecheck, lint, tests, build) and fix any issues
